# Alert

Styled alert component family built on zw-alert primitives.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/alert</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">primitive-only</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Install

This component does not have a registry template yet.

Install the primitive package instead:

```bash
pnpm add @zeus-web/alert
```

## Imports

Styled registry component:

Not available yet.

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from '@zeus-web/alert/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/alert/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop      | Type                                                                          | Default   | Description            |
| --------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ---------------------- |
| `variant` | `AlertVariant`<br />Values: `default`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `danger` | `default` | Visual style variant.  |
| `live`    | `string`                                                                      | `polite`  | ARIA live region mode. |

## Events

No public events documented.

## Slots

| Slot      | Description    |
| --------- | -------------- |
| `default` | Alert content. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `bg-background`
- `text-foreground`
- `border`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=alert-root]`
- `[data-slot=alert-title]`
- `[data-slot=alert-description]`

## Registry

Registry source: not available yet.

The `alert` primitive is available through `@zeus-web/alert`, but it is not currently installable through `zweb add alert`.

Use the primitive package directly until a registry template is added.

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Alert for system messages.
- Use AlertTitle for the heading.
- Use AlertDescription for the detail.

Do not:

- Do not use Alert for persistent banners outside the page content.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from '@/components/ui/alert'

export function Example() {
  return (
    <Alert variant="info">
      <AlertTitle>Heads up!</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>Info message here.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
  )
}
```
